duplication_removed: src/agent/constants.mjs local definitions -> re-exports from contracts.js
apps/studio/project-store.js local STAGES/PREBUILD_AXES -> imports from contracts.js
src/agent/orchestrator.mjs local GUARDIAN_NAMES/SOURCE_TRUST/CLASSIFICATIONS/cost limits -> imports from canonical
src/agent/studio-sync.mjs local AXIS_MAP -> imports STUDIO_AXIS_ALIASES from contracts

backward_compatibility.axis_alias_map: STUDIO_AXIS_ALIASES maps old Studio axis IDs to canonical IDs
backward_compatibility.score_migration: migrateReadinessScores() in project-store.js migrates old stored scores on load
backward_compatibility.sync_flexibility: normalizeReadiness() in studio-sync.mjs accepts both canonical and old axis IDs
